UserPreferences.title: UserPreferences
UserPreferences.description: Customized personality and recognition parameters for the AI Voice Assistant Zoya.

role.description: How Zoya should address the creator (e.g. Boss, Master, Sir).

favoriteTopic.description: The creator's preferred roast or discussion topic.

customNotes.description: Custom memories and context Zoya remembers.

voiceName.description: The prebuilt TTS voice ID for Zoya.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single text transcript in the history of conversations.

preferences/{userId}.description: Stores user-specific preferences and customization parameters.
